mission_scope: Advance an existing forex cointegration basket after the 66-pair scan had no unbuilt allocated EdgeLab candidates and QM5_12532/QM5_12533 were no longer Q02-blocked.

target_q05_before_repair.prior_ceiling_evidence: Repeated run_smoke subprocess timeouts at 1800 seconds before the latest invalid Q05 run.

code_changes.summary: Added USDJPY.DWX to basket_symbols as conversion-history scope for USD-denominated GBPJPY/AUDJPY accounting, matching the EA's OnInit SymbolSelect list.
Recorded the Q05 manifest-history repair and noted that no manual MT5 rerun was launched because of the observed timeout ceiling.
Added a focused regression test that asserts QM5_12772's manifest declares the symbols selected by the EA, including USDJPY.DWX conversion history.

queue_action.reason: Stopped at the Q05 backtest CPU ceiling per mission constraint; structural manifest repair is committed for the next controlled enqueue.
